cases.prompt: 프롬프트 바꿨는데 회귀 안 났는지 eval셋이랑 CI 게이트 만들어줘

assertions.text: Designs an eval set (golden / edge / adversarial).
Specifies a CI regression gate (threshold + baseline diff).
Warns about LLM-judge bias and data contamination.

cases.prompt: Build an LLM-as-judge eval harness for my summarizer

assertions.text: Selects metrics by task type (accuracy / semantic-sim / LLM-judge / rule).
Defines a result tracking schema and A/B or human eval loop.
